changelog:
v1.6.0 - Responsive Layout & Chat Polish

- Responsive grid layout for home screen: adapts from 1 to 4 columns based on screen width
- New responsive utilities: getDeviceType(), responsiveGridColumns(), responsivePadding(), responsiveIconSize(), responsiveFontSize()
- Chat input bar rewritten as StatefulWidget: 5 attachment icons collapsed into single [+] expand button with AttachmentPanel
- General Chat AI responses now render MarkdownBody instead of plain Text (fixes raw markdown display)
- Chat bubble widths clamped to 200-700px prevents unreachably wide bubbles on tablets
- Drawer scrolling fix: menu items wrapped in Expanded > SingleChildScrollView
- Role card truncation fix: maxLines 2, reduced padding, smaller icons for better fit
- Nemotron safety check wired into both chat screens for non-blocking content moderation
- Fixed landing page download URL: corrected asset name to match GitHub release filename
